description: Composition Off white sheer shirt made of a blended fabric with a soft drape, has a black spread collar with blunt tips, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, pockets on the chest, pleats at the back yoke and black tape detail along the placket and at the cuffs Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
